companyUrls.title: Company URLs or slugs
companyUrls.description: ConsumerAffairs company page URLs (e.g. https://www.consumeraffairs.com/homeowners/american_home_shield.html) or full paths (e.g. homeowners/american_home_shield).

maxReviewsPerCompany.title: Max reviews per company
maxReviewsPerCompany.description: Maximum number of reviews to extract per company. Set 0 for unlimited.

includeCompanyInfo.title: Include company profile info
includeCompanyInfo.description: Include a company profile summary (average rating, total reviews) as the first result for each company.

proxyConfig.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfig.description: Residential proxies recommended for ConsumerAffairs (PerimeterX bot protection).
